security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: http: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: http: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420

bundle.longDescription: Noteview is a lightweight, beautiful replacement for Notepad with live Markdown preview, rendered LaTeX and tables, rich-text formatting, and first-class Arabic / RTL support.
